text: How do the principles of church revitalisation match the work of the Holy Spirit? I write that the Spirit is the main driver of church revitalisation. I write that church leaders must work with the Spirit as the Spirit moves the church forward. The Spirit gives power to church leaders. The Spirit uses church leaders to bring a church community back to life, to freshen it, and to keep it growing. First I define the Spirit’s power with short biblical examples. Next I look at the basic ideas of how the Spirit gives power to church leaders. Finally I look at a simple method for church revitalisation. The writer ends by noting several signs of biblical empowerment in a local church community. Goddelike bemagtiging: Die Heilige Gees en kerkherstel. Watter plek het die goddelike werking van die Heilige Gees in die beginsels van kerkherstel? I think die Heilige Gees is the main agent that brings new life to die kerk and I think kerkleiers should follow die Heilige Gees and work for this. Die Heilige Gees bemagtig dus die kerkleiers wat Hy gebruik om ’n kerklike gemeenskap te laat herleef, te vernuwe en hulle te besiel met lewenskragtigheid. Die Gees se bemagtiging word kortliks aan die hand van bybelse voorbeelde gedefineer, waarna die grondliggende beginsels vir die bemagtiging van die kerkleiers ondersoek word. Daarna word die metodologie om nuwe lewenskrag in die kerk te bring kortliks oorweeg. Die outeur sluit af deur verskeie tekens uit te lig wat op skriftuurlike bemagtiging van die Heilige Gees in die plaaslike kerkgemeenskap dui.
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
